description: Mercantile letter, possibly sent from Aden to India. Reports that Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm b. Ḥalābū (?) was in a shipwreck at Dahlak, and that a letter from him from אלמכסר has arrived. Mentions numerous other commodities, dealings, and people's names. On verso mentions the judge Ḥiyya with many honorifics. (Information mainly from Goitein's attached notes.)
